title: BCC2025
description: Menu panoramas of the Blue City Circuit 2025 track.
body:
# BCC 2025 Menu Panorama Background

The Blue City Circuit Open is the largest event in ice boat racing, and to celebrate this, you can set your background in the game menu to the track itself.

Should work with any version **above 1.6.1**, however it will be blurred before **1.13**

Different shaders used in different versions of the pack.
